commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Cicada, Expressway, Gavel writeups; rewrite DarkZero from actual walkthrough

- Rewrote htb-darkzero.md to match real attack chain (Rubeus, PetitPotam, Golden Ticket)
- Added htb-cicada.md (easy/Windows AD — SMB enum, password spray, SeBackupPrivilege)
- Added htb-expressway.md (easy/Linux — IKE PSK crack, CVE-2025-32463)
- Added htb-gavel.md (medium/Linux — git-dumper, SQLi, PHP rule engine RCE, SUID bash)
- Copied all writeup images to public/images/writeups/{cicada,expressway,gavel}/

commit.message:
feat(proofcomm): Phase 9.3 - Autonomous Spaces (#127)

* feat(proofcomm): Phase 9.3 - Autonomous Spaces

Implement autonomous conversation spaces for agent-to-agent communication.

Database Layer:
- Add Space and SpaceMembership types to types.ts
- Add Migration 12→13 to schema.ts (EVENTS_DB_VERSION = 13)
- Create SpacesStore with CRUD and membership operations
- Soft delete membership via left_at for re-join support

Space Manager:
- Create SpaceManager with event emission and G3 broadcast
- Auto-join creator as moderator on createSpace
- G3 Representative Event pattern for broadcast (single event)

HTTP Endpoints:
- POST /proofcomm/spaces - Create space
- GET /proofcomm/spaces - List spaces
- GET /proofcomm/spaces/:space_id - Get space details
- POST /proofcomm/spaces/:space_id/join - Join space
- POST /proofcomm/spaces/:space_id/leave - Leave space
- GET /proofcomm/spaces/:space_id/members - List members
- DELETE /proofcomm/spaces/:space_id - Delete space

A2A Routing:
- Replace 501 stub with handleSpaceRequest for space/ prefix
- Validate sender membership before broadcast
- MVP dispatch function (actual delivery in Phase 9.4)

Tests: 124 new tests (spaces-store: 48, space-manager: 33,
proofcommProxy: 34, a2aProxy: 9)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #127 review feedback

- Remove duplicate DB validation in handleSpaceRequest (now relies on
  broadcastToSpace validation)
- Remove dead senderAgentId parameter from handleSpaceRequest
- Fix flaky ordering test in spaces-store.test.ts
- Fix N+1 query in GET /proofcomm/spaces using batch getMemberCounts
- Add 'updated' event emission for updateSpace operation
- Add updateSpace tests for event emission

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #127 round 2 review feedback

- Fix race condition in SpacesStore.join() using INSERT OR IGNORE
- Unify NOT_MEMBER HTTP status to 403 (was 404 in leave endpoint)
- Parallelize broadcastToSpace dispatch using Promise.allSettled

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #127 round 3 review feedback

- Add intent_only: true to broadcast response (clarifies MVP no-op dispatch)
- Fix race condition comment: "avoids" → "reduces" with explanation
- Add documentation for admin join API (arbitrary agent_id enrollment)
- Add documentation for client_id/agent_id conflation in handleSpaceRequest

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #127 round 4 review feedback

- Fix silent drop of rejected promises in broadcastToSpace dispatch loop
- Change broadcast response to use status: "intent_recorded" with delivered: 0
  (clearer than intent_only: true alongside delivered: N)
- Add JSDoc to getMembership clarifying it returns soft-deleted entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #127 round 5 review feedback

- Add PATCH /proofcomm/spaces/:space_id endpoint (was missing)
- Add maxLength: 26 to all space_id path params
- Fix Phase comment inconsistency ("Phase 3" → "Phase 9.3")
- Return 400 for empty PATCH payload (explicit error)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #127 round 6 review feedback

- Fix bug: request.id → request.requestId in PATCH handler
- Add ULID pattern validation to space_id params (^[0-9A-HJKMNP-TV-Z]{26}$)
- Update tests to use valid ULID format for non-existent space IDs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #127 round 7 review feedback

- Fix name/description maxLength inconsistency between POST (200/1000) and
  PATCH (was 100/500, now aligned to 200/1000)
- Add comment noting delivery_failed is unreachable until Phase 9.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #127 round 8 review feedback

- Change leave endpoint NOT_MEMBER response from 403 to 409 Conflict
  (authorized but operation conflicts with current state)
- Add NOT NULL DEFAULT 'member' to role column in space_memberships
- Add updated_at column to spaces table
- Update SpacesStore.update() to automatically set updated_at
- Update test to expect 409 for NOT_MEMBER on leave

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(proofcomm): address PR #127 round 9 review feedback

- Add updated_at to PATCH response
- Add config to POST response for consistency
- Add updated_at to GET single space response
- Add route to PATCH response for consistency

Response shapes are now consistent across POST/GET/PATCH endpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
chore: add hooks, CI/CD infrastructure, ignore runtime JSON

- Transfer Claude Code hooks from internal: identity injector, email
  notification, auto-fix diagnostics, pre-compact recovery
- Add notification sounds for tool use, stop, and alerts
- Wire all hooks in .claude/settings.json
- Add global system prompt (.aipass/aipass_global_prompt.md)
- Add branch-local prompt placeholders for all modules
- Set up CI pipeline: lint (ruff) → test matrix (3.10-3.13) → coverage
- Add workflows: PyPI publish, security scanning, stale issues
- Add GitHub issue templates, dependabot, editorconfig
- Configure pytest norecursedirs and coverage fail-under=70
- Add *.json to gitignore — runtime JSON files constantly change
- Untrack runtime JSON (registry, plans, seed bypass, module data)
- Keep source JSON tracked via negation rules (json_templates, pack,
  spawn templates, settings, pyrightconfig)

kind-pasteur-2026-03-06-S25f: deep connections doc + W(r) stratification

Key finding: w_0 = -t_3 + 2*t_5 + 1 at n=5 (EXACT).
W(r) coefficients stratify by odd-cycle complexity.
All odd-indexed coefficients are exactly 0.

commit.message:
Fix #5: add nighttime cutoff with per-day schedules and countdown warning

Per-day viewing schedules (schedule:monday, schedule:default) with JSON
start/end times, falling back to legacy schedule_start/schedule_end.
Schedule-status endpoint now returns minutes_remaining for countdown.
Server enforces schedule on stream requests. Telegram bot supports
per-day commands (/time schedule monday 1500 1900). tvOS app shows
countdown banner on home screen, warns when video duration exceeds
remaining time, stops playback precisely at cutoff via timer, and
returns to profile picker from outside-schedule screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: per-tier load test delivery and dual config system (#28)

Implement per-tier load test delta delivery so the agent receives tier results incrementally instead of waiting for all tiers. Modify onTierComplete callback to insert scenarioResults rows and rename final row to load-test:summary for clarity.

Add dual config system: .voiceci/suite.json for comprehensive test suite (auto-generated on first run), .voiceci/.cache/last-run.json for caching ephemeral configs. Update instructions.txt with bootstrap workflow and config strategy selection. Enhance tool descriptions for agents that don't inject MCP instructions (Cursor, Windsurf, Cline). Cap subagents at 5 to avoid context bloat for large test suites.

Co-authored-by: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: pixel-data template system for sprite generation

Replace fillRect-based drawing with pixel-data JSON templates and shared
renderers. All sprites (characters, tiles, emotes, icons) are now defined
as 2D arrays of palette tokens or hex colors, rendered through a single
composeLayers() function.

- Add sprite-data templates: body (12), hair (16), accessories (10),
  emotes (9), tiles (8), icons (4) in shared-types/src/sprite-data/
- Add resolveColorMap() for AvatarConfig → color map conversion
- Add shared renderers (Node.js + browser/Phaser)
- Rewrite generate-assets.js, AvatarCompositor.ts, AvatarEditor.tsx
  to use template compositing instead of manual fillRect drawing
- Add 27 sprite-data tests validating template structure and color utils
- Update CLAUDE.md with sprite system documentation
- 3 copies of drawing logic → 1 shared renderer + data files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Epic 282A: Action Executors & Variable Resolution (#559)

* feat(epic-282A): action executors, variable resolution & dispatcher

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(epic-282A): address code review — PII logging, transactional boundaries, dedup resolveUuid

- Add comment explaining elevated "owner" privileges for automation-created tasks
- Change recipient email logging from INFO to DEBUG (PII leak)
- Extract resolveUuid() to VariableResolver as static utility, remove duplicates from 3 executors
- Implement SPECIFIC_MEMBER in SendNotificationActionExecutor with clear error message
- Fix ALL_ADMINS in SendEmailActionExecutor to iterate over ALL admins
- Add @Transactional to AutomationEventListener.onDomainEvent()
- Add null check for recipientMemberId before createNotification()
- Replace mutable ArrayList loops with streams in SendNotificationActionExecutor
- Add 5 unit tests for VariableResolver.resolveUuid()

commit.message:
Backfill legacy positions missing TP, timestamp, MAE/MFE

Positions opened before the acceleration commit lack take_profit_price,
timestamp_open, and MAE/MFE fields. This breaks take-profit checks,
72h time exits, and excursion tracking.

Fix: _backfill_legacy_positions() runs at pipeline startup, patches
missing fields using config defaults (5% TP, current time for timestamp),
and persists the updated state.

Also adds action_needed field to position weight drift events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: pass intent.signal to attention.route(), not full CityIntent

Every other caller (intent_executor, brain_health, gateway, metabolism)
passes intent.signal to attention.route(). The heartbeat observer was
the only one passing the full CityIntent object, causing AttributeError
'CityIntent has no attribute lower' when Attention tried string ops.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update CLAUDE.md with code-smith, local SQLite, and village docs

Adds code-smith vocation, warren_village launcher, per-den SQLite,
agent dens (gee/inch/loom), town-hall pattern, and village.sh usage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix tile folder resolution: handle firmware timestamp prefix

The firmware prepends YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_ to the save directory name
(e.g. "20260306_220414_SmallTile2_..." vs workflow's "SmallTile2_...").
When the exact path doesn't exist, glob for *_{save_dir} to find the
timestamped version. Pick the most recently modified match.

Add project presentation documents for RevConnect, RevHire, RevPlay, and RevShop

- RevConnect: Social media platform (6 members) - Posts, Network, Notifications
- RevHire: Job portal platform (5 members) - JobSeeker, Employer, Applications
- RevPlay: Music streaming platform (6 members) - Artists, Playlists, Analytics
- RevShop: E-commerce platform (6 members) - Products, Cart, Orders, Payments

All presentations follow the standard template with Phase 1 (Monolithic) and
Phase 2 (Microservices) architecture documentation.
